label: no
cot_prefix: Okay, let's think through this carefully. We are asked to determine between what times Richard could have gone to the bakery, given the information about when various people saw him doing different activities, and the fact that the bakery was closed after 7pm. Let me go through each person's observation one by one: 1. Richard woke up at 8am. 2. Betty saw Richard reading at the library from 9am to 2pm. 3. David saw Richard fixing their computer at the electronic store from 2pm to 4pm. 4. Mary saw Richard taking photos near the Eiffel Tower from 4pm to 5pm.
